name: sensorQueueMosiData
title: sensorQueueMosiData
syntax: SensorErrorCode sensorQueueMosiData(char[] sysVarNamespace, byte buffer[], dword bitCount);
description: This function is intended to be used for SPI master simulation. It inserts the given MOSI data into the send queue from the master to the given slave.

parameters.name: sysVarNamespace
parameters.description: The namespace of the slave the data shall be queued for.
